title: tanacetum pacificum
intro: Tanacetum pacificum, also known as Pacific tansy or Mountain tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum pacificum include its ability to alleviate headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum pacificum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
